title: The Syntactic Structure of Spanish
catalogDescription: Scientific study of the syntax of Spanish: structure of phrases, transformationally derived structures, grammatical relations, principles of interpretation. Prerequisite: SPAN 312 or SPAN 313; and either SPAN 323, LING 200, or LING 400. Offered: jointly with SPAN 400.
prerequisiteNotes: Official UW prerequisite text: SPAN 312 or SPAN 313; and either SPAN 323, LING 200, or LING 400.
prerequisite text is preserved as a note until a parser can safely normalize AND/OR/minimum-grade semantics into graph prerequisites.

title: Advanced Spanish Grammar
catalogDescription: Problems of Spanish grammar. Differences from English grammar. Techniques for the effective teaching of Spanish. Prerequisite: SPAN 312 or SPAN 313; and either SPAN 323, LING 200, or LING 400. Offered: jointly with SPAN 406; A.
